fuel.finding: FuelUsePerHour is instantaneous and can be present when FuelLevel is invalid.
fuel.modelV2Rule: Expose instantaneous burn as diagnostic evidence; measured fuel baselines require rolling local-driver fuel-level deltas over valid green distance.

radar.finding: CarLeftRight side signals and decoded nearby-car placement are related but not interchangeable.
radar.modelV2Rule: Keep side occupancy as its own evidence family and keep radar placement limited to lap-distance/track-length-backed cars.

gap.finding: Reference F2 can exist while leader F2 is missing; treating missing leader F2 as zero can overstate gaps.
gap.modelV2Rule: Carry leader-F2-missing as partial evidence instead of marking the gap reliable.

positionCadence.finding: Raw captures can count whether CarIdxPosition and CarIdxClassPosition change before lap completion.
positionCadence.modelV2Rule: Require repeated real-session evidence before assuming standings and relative overlays can update position changes continuously within a lap.

promotionGuidance: Use live-model-parity promotion artifacts from several real sessions before making model v2 authoritative for current overlays.
